mapper.select: SELECT id_board, st_pid, st_order, st_title, tx_board, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_board WHERE COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N' ORDER BY st_pid DESC, st_order ASC
SELECT id_board, st_pid, st_order, st_title, tx_board, dt_insert::text AS inserted_at, dt_update::text AS updated_at FROM t_board WHERE id_board = #{idBoard} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(id_board AS BIGINT)), 0) + 1 FROM t_board
SELECT st_order FROM t_board WHERE st_pid = #{stPid} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N' AND st_order LIKE CONCAT(#{parentOrder}, '#%') AND LENGTH(st_order) = LENGTH(#{parentOrder}) + 4
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_board ( id_board, st_pid, st_order, st_title, tx_board, yn_use, id_insert, dt_insert ) VALUES ( #{idBoard}, #{stPid}, #{stOrder}, #{title}, #{text}, 'Y', 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_board SET st_title = #{title}, tx_board = #{text}, id_update = 'system', dt_update = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id_board = #{idBoard} AND COALESCE(yn_use, 'Y') != 'N'
UPDATE t_board SET yn_use = 'N', id_update = 'system', dt_update = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id_board = #{idBoard}
